name: SUMMER VEGETABLE and TOFU KEBABS with POMEGRANATE-PEACH BARBECUE SAUCE

ingredients.item: 28 ounces extra-firm tofu, frozen and thawed
ingredients.original: 28 ounces extra-firm tofu, frozen and thawed

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil, plus more for oiling
ingredients.original: 3 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil, plus more for oiling

ingredients.item: 1 globe eggplant (about 1 pound), cut into 1-inch chunks
ingredients.original: 1 globe eggplant (about 1 pound), cut into 1-inch chunks

ingredients.item: 1 green bell pepper, cut into 1-inch squares
ingredients.original: 1 green bell pepper, cut into 1-inch squares

ingredients.item: 1 large red bell pepper, cut into 1-inch squares
ingredients.original: 1 large red bell pepper, cut into 1-inch squares

ingredients.item: 1 large red onion, quartered vertically, then halved crosswise
